name: PoetryDB
description: List poets, search poems by title or author, and retrieve random poems from PoetryDB's public collection.

tools.name: list_authors
tools.description: List all authors represented in the PoetryDB collection.

tools.name: search_poems_by_title
tools.description: Find poems whose titles contain the supplied text.

params.name: title
params.description: Full or partial poem title; URL-encode spaces and other reserved characters.

tools.name: search_poems_by_author
tools.description: Find poems whose author names contain the supplied text.

params.name: author
params.description: Full or partial author name; URL-encode spaces and other reserved characters.

tools.name: get_random_poems
tools.description: Retrieve a requested number of randomly selected poems.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of random poems to return.
